zh.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell是Maccus的兒子，於大約1140年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾迪維達爾。他至少有3個兒子。他去世於大約1206年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

en.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell was born about 1140, in Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Scotland as the son of Maccus. He had at least 3 sons. He died about 1206, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell est né environ 1140, à Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Écosse, fils de Maccus. Il a eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1206, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell wurde um 1140 in Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Maccus geboren. Er hatte mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1206 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell è nato il circa 1140 nel Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Scotland come figlio di Maccus. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1206, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswellは約1140年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアテヴィオトダルでMaccusの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1206年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell(은)는 대략 1140년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 테비엇데일에서 Maccus의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1206년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Scotland filho de Maccus. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1206, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell родился около 1140 г. в местности тевиотдеил, роксбургшир, Шотландия. Его отца звали Maccus. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1206 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Herbert de Maccuswell nació aproximadamente 1140, en Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Scotland como hijo de Maccus. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1206, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
